title: canVODpy — Test Data
description: Reference GNSS observation dataset for validation and end-to-end testing of the canVODpy GNSS Transmissometry pipeline. Contains real GNSS observations in RINEX v3.04, RINEX v2.11, Septentrio Binary Format (SBF), and NMEA formats from three field sites: Rosalia (Austria), Missouri Ozark Flux Tower (MOFLUX, USA), and Hainich National Park (Germany). Covers DOY 2025-001 (full 24-hour day) for Rosalia and MOFLUX, and a 1-hour campaign on DOY 2026-001 for Hainich.

creators.name: Bader, Nicolas François
creators.affiliation: Climate and Environmental Remote Sensing Research Unit (CLIMERS), Department of Geodesy and Geoinformation, TU Wien
